summary: Target Allocation System with hierarchical structure (Territory → City → Resource) fully tested. Backend: 10/13 tests passed (3 skipped due to no sales resources in test city). Frontend: All core UI flows verified - plan list, create plan, dashboard with timeline/milestones, add territory allocation, drill-down navigation, breadcrumb navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/target-planning - List all target plans (200)
Backend: POST /api/target-planning - Create new target plan with name, dates, milestones, amount
Backend: GET /api/target-planning/{plan_id} - Get plan detail with allocations
Backend: GET /api/target-planning/{plan_id}/dashboard - Dashboard with timeline, milestones, revenue tracking
Backend: GET /api/master-locations - Territory dropdown populated with South India, North India, etc.
Backend: POST /api/target-planning/{plan_id}/allocations - Add territory allocation
Backend: DELETE /api/target-planning/{plan_id}/allocations/{id} - Cascade delete works
Backend: DELETE /api/target-planning/{plan_id} - Delete plan and all allocations
Backend: Existing plan 813fbe91-8434-4bd6-bc7b-49bd1ebca9b5 - Has South India (₹48L) with Bengaluru city (₹20L)
Frontend: Target Planning list page loads with plan cards showing status, amount, time elapsed, allocated %
Frontend: Create Target Plan dialog - Plan Name, Start/End Date, Target Type, Amount, Milestones fields
Frontend: New plan creates and navigates to dashboard with success toast
Frontend: Timeline Progress bar shows 4 milestones with dates, clickable milestone popups
Frontend: Estimated Revenue card (Won Leads) and Actual Revenue card (Invoices) displayed
Frontend: Target Allocations section shows Total Target, Allocated, Remaining, Progress
Frontend: Add Territory allocation dialog - Territory dropdown, Percentage/Amount toggle, real-time calculation
Frontend: Territory allocation card shows with progress bar (allocated/remaining)
Frontend: Click on territory name drills down to city level
Frontend: City level shows Add City button, Territory Budget, Available to Allocate
Frontend: Bengaluru city allocation visible with amount and remaining budget
Frontend: Click on city drills down to resource level showing Add Resource button
Frontend: Breadcrumb navigation (All Territories > South India > Bengaluru) works correctly
Frontend: Breadcrumb click navigates back to correct level
skipped_tests: Backend: Add City allocation - Skipped due to test territory having no cities in first test
Backend: Get Resources by City - Skipped
critical_code_review_comments: Hierarchical allocation system correctly implements Territory → City → Resource structure
Dashboard API correctly builds nested children structure with allocated_to_children calculation
Cascade delete properly removes parent and all child allocations
Breadcrumb navigation state managed correctly in React component
Real-time percentage-to-amount calculation working in allocation dialog
data-testid attributes properly placed for testability (create-plan-btn, add-allocation-btn, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Test plan TEST_Q1_Automation_Plan was created and cleaned up. Existing test data: Plan ID 813fbe91-8434-4bd6-bc7b-49bd1ebca9b5 (H2 2026 Sales Target) with South India territory (₹48L) and Bengaluru city (₹20L) allocations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Target Planning module fully functional. Key data-testids: create-plan-btn, plan-name-input, plan-start-date, plan-end-date, plan-amount-input, plan-milestones-select, submit-plan-btn, add-allocation-btn, territory-select, city-select, resource-select. Drill-down works by clicking on the territory/city name (h4 element). Existing test plan: 813fbe91-8434-4bd6-bc7b-49bd1ebca9b5.

verified_features.Target Plan CRUD: Create, Read, Delete working. Update endpoint exists but not tested in UI
verified_features.Timeline Progress: Shows milestones, days elapsed/remaining, clickable milestone popups
verified_features.Revenue Tracking: Estimated (Won Leads) and Actual (Invoices) revenue cards
verified_features.Territory Allocation: Add via dialog with percentage/amount input, shows in leaderboard card
verified_features.City Allocation: Drill-down from territory shows cities, Add City dialog available
verified_features.Resource Allocation: Drill-down from city to resource level, Add Resource button shown
verified_features.Hierarchical Navigation: Breadcrumb navigation working at all levels
verified_features.Cascade Delete: Deleting parent allocation removes all children
